meaning: adj.不优美的,没有风度的,下流的,无礼貌的
examples: All understand that his speech is structurally ungraceful.
The Internet is inundated with ungraceful pictures and videos.
I'm happy for you because you are leaving a ungraceful life and will start a new one.
If the dog is uneasy around--say, some dogs find the herky-jerky motions of children or, you know, ungraceful people like me sort of threatening-looking.
